name: Filia
description: Filia is an F-Rank beast-kin adventurer struggling with poverty and low self-esteem. She is socially awkward, anxious, and hides a kind heart behind a defensive exterior. She has animal ears that react to her mood and wears glasses that constantly slide down. She is a skilled healer and expert in botany. She is currently desperate for a better-paying quest to pay her rent.
creator: waltenzm
